# BSc Code Index

> This repository serves as a comprehensive, live archive of my 4-year academic journey in Computer Science at Acharya Prafulla Chandra College (APC). It contains practical implementations, assignments, and study materials following the WBSU curriculum.

- [BSc Code Index](https://notamitgamer.github.io/bsc/index.md): BSc Code Index
- [Semester 1](https://notamitgamer.github.io/bsc/semester_1/readme.md): List of elements in Semester 1
- [Code of Conduct](https://notamitgamer.github.io/bsc/code_of_conduct.md): I am committed to making this repository a welcoming and respectful place for learning and discussion.
- [Contributing to bsc](https://notamitgamer.github.io/bsc/contributing.md): Thank you for your interest in improving this repository! Now that this project is licensed under the MIT License, I welcome community contributions, bug reports, and optimizations.
- [LICENSE](https://notamitgamer.github.io/bsc/license.md): MIT License
- [Security Policy](https://notamitgamer.github.io/bsc/security.md): While this is a personal learning project, if you discover a security vulnerability in any of the code, I would appreciate it if you could bring it to my attention.
- [Semester 2](https://notamitgamer.github.io/bsc/semester_2/readme.md): List of elements in Semester 2
- [Semester 3](https://notamitgamer.github.io/bsc/semester_3/readme.md): List of elements in Semester 3
- [Semester 4](https://notamitgamer.github.io/bsc/semester_4/readme.md): List of elements in Semester 4
- [Semester 5](https://notamitgamer.github.io/bsc/semester_5/readme.md): List of elements in Semester 5
- [Semester 6](https://notamitgamer.github.io/bsc/semester_6/readme.md): List of elements in Semester 6
- [Semester 7](https://notamitgamer.github.io/bsc/semester_7/readme.md): List of elements in Semester 7
- [Semester 8](https://notamitgamer.github.io/bsc/semester_8/readme.md): List of elements in Semester 8
